DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE SEP-08-2023 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MATTER MISCALENDARED IN DISCOVERY. MATTER IS TRANSFERRED TO BE HEARD ON THE SAME DAY AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPARTMENT 302 ON THE LAW & MOTION CALENDAR. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEFFREY WOHL; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED (302/JPT)

LAW AND MOTION, 302, CITIBANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR NONCOMPLIANCE WITH CCP 439, WHICH REQUIRES THAT THE PARTIES CONDUCT A "MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" BEFORE A JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS FILED. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IMMEDIATELY AND THE RESPONSE IS NOW DUE BY OCTOBER 9, 2023. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/JMQ)

calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-16-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Linda Krall.

Dept. 505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K. Valdes; Bailiff: Deputy Bastain: Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:22:03 a.m. and concluding at 10:27:22 a.m.(D505)

Brian Langedyk, Esq. appearing for and on behalf of Plaintiff Citibank, N.A.
Defendant Linda Krall not appearing.

Plaintiff's complaint for exempt collection filed November 8, 2022.
Proof of personal service as to defendant filed December 1, 2022.
Answer by defendant Linda Krall filed on January 31, 2023.
Order granting Plaintiff's motion to have its requests admitted filed August 2, 2023.

The Court addresses Plaintiff's counsel for offer of proof.

The Court takes judicial notice of the order granting Plaintiff's motion to have its requests admitted filed August 2, 2023.

Based on the testimony provided and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Citibank N.A. and against Defendant Linda Krall as follows:

Damages $13,437.86
Interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $498.50

Proposed judgment was executed by the Court and filed this day.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-16-2023 Assigned To Trial Court

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS (MISCALENDARED IN DISCOVERY)
Off Calendar Sep-08-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS (MISCALENDARED as a DISCOVERY motion)

Citibank, N.A.'s motion for judgment on the pleadings is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 439, which requires that the parties conduct a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a judgment on the pleadings is filed. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and the response is now due by October 9, 2023.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JMQ)

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Sep-08-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING rE: PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Miscalendared in Discovery. Matter is transferred to be heard on the same day at 9:30 a.m. in Department 302 on the Law & Motion Calendar.

Judge Pro Tem: Jeffrey Wohl; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-26-2023 Set For Trial On Oct-16-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion To Deem Facts Admitted
Off Calendar Jun-06-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A.'s Motion To Deem Facts Admitted.

PLAINTIFF, CITIBANK, N.A.'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO HAVE ITS REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION NOS. 1-5 BE DEEMED TO BE ADMITTED IS GRANTED AS FOLLOWS;
(1) WITHIN TEN (10) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER DEFENDANT LINDA KRAL (HEREAFTER EITHER "DEFENDANT" OR "KRAL") IS ORDERED TO DELIVER TO PLAINTIFF WITHOUT OBJECTION VERIFIED CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ADMISSION NOS 1-5.
(2) IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLY WITH THE PROVISIONS OF PARAGRAPH (1) ABOVE, THE FACTS CALLED FOR BY EACH REQUEST FOR ADMISSION WILL BE DEEMED TO HAVE BEEN ADMITTED AND DEFENDANT WILL BE PRECLUDED FROM OFFERING ANY EVIDENCE CONTRART TO THE ADMITTED FACTS.

COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF SHOULD PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THIS RULING, SUBMIT A COPY TO DEFENDANT FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM AND DELIVER A COPY IN WORDFORM TO THE COURT at rennepar85@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
